title: Factors and Multiples
blurb: Placeholder — find factors, multiples, GCF, and LCM of whole numbers.

lessons.title: Factors and Multiples
lessons.concreteComparison: Placeholder — real-world opener authored in Step 3. Example: arranging 12 chairs into equal rows — the number of rows must be a factor of 12.
lessons.objective: Placeholder — list factors and multiples of a number; find the GCF and LCM of two numbers.
concept: Placeholder concept paragraph. A factor of $n$ divides $n$ evenly. A multiple of $n$ is $n \times k$ for some whole number $k$.

workedExamples.statement: Placeholder problem. Find the GCF of 12 and 18.
workedExamples.solution: Placeholder solution. Factors of 12: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 12. Factors of 18: 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 18. GCF = 6.

tryIt.statement: Placeholder try-it. Find the LCM of 4 and 6.
tryIt.solution: Placeholder solution. Multiples of 4: 4, 8, 12, 16 ... Multiples of 6: 6, 12 ... LCM = 12.

practice.statement: Placeholder practice problem. Is 7 a factor of 49?

testYourself.statement: Placeholder test problem. Two buses depart every 8 and 12 minutes respectively. When do they next depart together?
